tasks.title: Review crates/ragent-tui for compliance and security
tasks.description: Run a code review of the crates/ragent-tui directory and produce a markdown report saved to docs/reports/ragent-tui-compliance.md. Include issues, severity, file locations, suggested fixes, and milestones/tasks with estimated hours.

tasks.title: Review crates/ragent-tui for compliance, anti-patterns, and security
tasks.description:
Perform a thorough code review of the crates/ragent-tui crate. Focus areas:
- Compliance with project guidelines (AGENTS.md): docs, logging, formatting, tests location, doc comments
- Rust anti-patterns: unwraps, expect, clone/alloc inefficiencies, excessive complexity, misuse of async
- Security: unvalidated inputs, unsafe blocks, command execution, dependency issues
Deliverables:
- A detailed list of issues with file paths, line numbers, severity, and recommended fix
- A remediation plan split into Milestones and Tasks, with priorities and estimates
- A final report written to docs/reports/ragent-tui-compliance.md
Please claim and complete this task and reply when done.

tasks.title: Static review of ragent-tui crate
tasks.description: Perform a static code review of crates/ragent-tui, focusing on compliance, anti-patterns, and security. Produce a JSON findings report mapping files to issues (include severity, evidence, suggested fixes) and propose remediation milestones.
